matcher.subject: Mathematics
matcher.coveragePreview: surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes grade level mathematics students cube surface area & volume cuboid surface area & volume cylinder surface area & volume sphere surface area & volume surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes introduction to 3d geometry topic: surface areas & volumes focus: cubes, cylinders, spheres essential question: how do we quantify a shape? what we will master today learning objectives for surface area and volume define surface area vs. volume clearly apply formulas: cube, cuboid, cylinder, sphere solve real-world problems involving 3d shapes what you already know 2d area and perimeter review recall area formulas: square (s²), rectangle (l×w) understand perimeter as boundary length connect 2d 'area' to 3d 'surface' which box is better? real-world application of surface area and volume scenario: two boxes of cereal box a: tall & thin (high surface area) box b: short & wide (low surface area) surface area vs. volume defined definitions of surface area and volume total surface area (tsa): sum of all face areas curved surface area (csa): only curved faces volume: space enclosed within boundaries formulas: cube & cuboid cube and cuboid surface area/volume formul...
